cookies.title: Session Cookies (JSON)
cookies.description: Your session cookies exported from Chrome after logging in via Google. Use the 'Cookie-Editor' extension → Export → JSON. Paste the full JSON array here.

targetDays.title: Days to book
targetDays.description: Days of the week to monitor. Valid values: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday.

targetTimeFrom.title: Book classes from (time)
targetTimeFrom.description: Only book classes starting at or after this time. Use HH:MM format, e.g. 16:00 for 4 PM. Works with half-hour slots too — a class at 16:30 will match a range of 16:00–20:00.

targetTimeTo.title: Book classes until (time)
targetTimeTo.description: Only book classes starting at or before this time. Use HH:MM format, e.g. 20:00 for 8 PM.

instructors.title: Instructors (optional)
instructors.description:
Only book classes with these instructors. Leave empty to accept any.

Available instructors:
• Anna Hrubošová
• Kateřina Krajcarová
• Kateřina Opelková
• Lenka Šlaufová
• Lucie Březíková
• Lucie Šenkýřová
• Sabina Poislová

classTypes.title: Class types (optional)
classTypes.description:
Only book these class types. Leave empty to accept any.

Available class types:
• Individuální lekce
• Individuální lekce 2 jezdci
• Individuální lekce začátečník
• Individuální skoková lekce 2 jezdci
• Praxe SZŠ
• Praxe SZŠ 2.B
• Skupinová lekce
• Skupinová lekce – děti začátečníci
• Stájník

bookFromDate.title: Book from date
bookFromDate.description: Only book classes on or after this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2026-09-01 for the start of the academic year.

bookUntilDate.title: Book until date
bookUntilDate.description: Only book classes on or before this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Example: 2027-06-30 for the end of the academic year.

bookingUrl.title: Booking URL
bookingUrl.description: Base URL of the booking system.

exportAllClasses.title: Export all available classes to dataset
exportAllClasses.description: When enabled, pushes every class found across the full date range to the dataset — including date, time, instructor, class type, and availability status. Useful for browsing what's on offer before setting up filters.

dryRun.title: Dry run (no actual booking)
dryRun.description: Check for available classes but do NOT book them. Use this for testing.
